properties.name: Suwalki Gap — NATO Ground Corridor Severance
properties.trigger: Russian breakthrough to Kaliningrad via Belarus-Lithuania seam
properties.impact: Baltic states cut off from NATO ground reinforcement within 60 hours
properties.cascade: Article 5 invocation + nuclear signaling + global markets collapse
properties.doctrine: Fait Accompli Seizure — present NATO with irreversible facts before Article 5 can activate
properties.wounding_strategy: 65km corridor between Poland and Lithuania is NATO's single most critical land vulnerability. Russian seizure in <72hr creates irreversible strategic fait accompli — Baltic states become NATO's Crimea.

properties.name: Kaliningrad — Nuclear Forward Posture Escalation
properties.trigger: NATO threshold-crossing support to Ukraine (long-range strike, troops)
properties.impact: Iskander-M nuclear-capable missiles pre-delegated targeting NATO capitals
properties.cascade: Nuclear signaling triggering NATO DEFCON equivalent escalation
properties.doctrine: Escalate to De-escalate — demonstrate willingness to cross nuclear threshold to force negotiation
properties.wounding_strategy: Kaliningrad hosts Iskander-M with nuclear warheads within 500km of Berlin, Warsaw, Copenhagen. Russian military doctrine explicitly permits tactical nuclear use to halt conventional defeat.

properties.name: Moldova/Transnistria — Frozen Conflict Activation
properties.trigger: Moldova EU accession progress crossing Kremlin red line
properties.impact: Russian 14th Army remnant (1,500 troops) + Transnistrian militia activates
properties.cascade: Romanian NATO intervention risk; Ukraine second front; EU accession derailed
properties.doctrine: Frozen Conflict Weaponization — activate dormant conflict as EU/NATO accession veto
properties.wounding_strategy: Russia maintains ~1,500 troops illegally in Transnistria since 1992. Activation creates NATO's second simultaneous European land crisis — designed to overwhelm Western crisis management capacity.

properties.name: Baltic Cyber-Physical Infrastructure Cascade
properties.trigger: NATO forward deployment to Baltic exceeding Russian tolerance threshold
properties.impact: Simultaneous power grid, telecom, banking, water system disruption across Estonia/Latvia/Lithuania
properties.cascade: Mass civilian panic + Article 5 ambiguity + NATO response paralysis
properties.doctrine: Grey Zone Below Article 5 — cause maximum damage without triggering collective defense
properties.wounding_strategy: Estonia's 2007 cyberattack was world's first nation-state cyber war. Baltic critical infrastructure now more hardened but simultaneous multi-system attack designed to overwhelm incident response — achieves kinetic effect without kinetic trigger.

properties.name: Serbia-Kosovo Northern Flashpoint — Kinetic Escalation
properties.trigger: Kosovo government attempt to extend sovereignty over Serb-majority north
properties.impact: Armed clash between KSF and Serbia-backed paramilitaries triggering NATO KFOR response
properties.cascade: Serbia mobilization + Republika Srpska declaration + Balkan multi-state crisis
warning_indicators: Serbian MUP (Interior Ministry) covert ops in north Kosovo
Vucic military exercises on Kosovo border
properties.doctrine: Controlled Escalation — use north Kosovo violence as EU accession leverage
properties.wounding_strategy: 2023 North Kosovo standoff ended without resolution. Vucic-Putin axis views Kosovo as permanent Russian leverage over EU Balkans expansion. Armed incident is pressure tool, not miscalculation.

properties.name: Bosnia-Herzegovina — Republika Srpska Secession Declaration
properties.trigger: EUFOR ALTHEA reduction + Dodik ICC/US sanctions + Russian political support
properties.impact: RS declares secession, deploys own security forces — Dayton Agreement collapses
properties.cascade: Regional war revival; NATO/EU forced military response; refugee crisis
properties.doctrine: Salami Slicing — incremental sovereignty assertion until Dayton architecture collapses
properties.wounding_strategy: Dodik has been sanctioned by US and UK but Russia vetoes UN action. Each RS parallel institution built reduces cost of final secession act. Designed to test if NATO/EU will defend Dayton with force.

properties.name: Armenia-Azerbaijan — Round 3 Zangezur Corridor
properties.trigger: Armenia refusal to cede Zangezur Corridor land connection to Nakhchivan/Turkey
properties.impact: Azeri military seizure of Syunik Province (Armenia's southern corridor)
properties.cascade: Armenia isolated; Iran-Azerbaijan border tension; Russia-CSTO credibility collapse complete
warning_indicators: Azeri military positioning near Syunik border
properties.doctrine: Triumphal Momentum — use 2020+2023 victories to achieve maximal gains before Armenia rebuilds
properties.wounding_strategy: Azerbaijan has 2-1 military advantage, Turkey backing, and CSTO proved worthless to Armenia. Aliyev's nationalist mandate requires Zangezur. Armenia's existential geography is its terminal vulnerability.

properties.name: Georgia — Russian Ratchet + Color Revolution Suppression
properties.trigger: Mass pro-EU protests threatening Georgian Dream parliamentary control
properties.impact: Russian-style crackdown + possible covert Russian intervention via Abkhazia/S.Ossetia
properties.cascade: EU accession process frozen; Western response paralysis; Russian soft annexation
warning_indicators: Georgian Dream foreign agents law enforcement intensification
Mass protest size exceeding 2003 Rose Revolution scale
properties.doctrine: Gradual Finlandization — neutralize Georgia without military cost
properties.wounding_strategy: 20% of Georgian territory already Russian-occupied. Georgian Dream's foreign agents law is Russian playbook. Massive 2024-25 protests show society is split — perfect conditions for managed destabilization.

properties.name: Iran Nuclear Threshold — Israeli Pre-emptive Strike Window
properties.trigger: Iran enrichment crossing 90% weapons-grade OR IAEA inspector expulsion
properties.impact: Israeli Air Force multi-wave strike on Fordow/Natanz/Arak — Iran retaliates with ballistic missiles
properties.cascade: Hormuz closure + Hezbollah escalation + US force protection missions = full regional war
warning_indicators: Israeli Air Force F-35I sortie rate
US carrier group repositioning to CENTCOM
properties.doctrine: Begin Doctrine — destroy enemy nuclear capability before it becomes existential threat
properties.wounding_strategy: Israel destroyed Iraq's Osirak 1981, Syria's Al-Kibar 2007. Iran is 10x harder — dispersed, hardened, deeply buried. But existential nuclear threat overrides all cost calculations in Israeli strategic doctrine.

properties.name: Strait of Hormuz — Iranian Naval + Mine Interdiction
properties.trigger: Israeli or US military strike on Iranian territory
properties.impact: 21 million barrels/day blocked; global oil price to $200+; recession trigger
properties.cascade: Saudi Aramco under missile attack; US-Iran naval battle in Gulf; NATO Article 4 consultations
warning_indicators: IRGCN fast boat swarm exercise tempo
properties.doctrine: Asymmetric Denial — impose catastrophic global economic cost without nuclear escalation
properties.wounding_strategy: Iran has rehearsed Hormuz closure repeatedly. At 34km wide at narrowest, mines + anti-ship missiles + fast boat swarms create multi-layer denial. US would need 30+ days to clear — global economy cannot wait 30 days.

properties.name: Houthi Red Sea Escalation — Suez Corridor Permanent Disruption
properties.trigger: Gaza ceasefire collapse OR Israeli West Bank annexation move
properties.impact: All commercial shipping permanently rerouted via Cape of Good Hope; Suez revenue collapse
properties.cascade: European inflation; Egypt economic crisis; Red Sea as permanent warfare zone
warning_indicators: Houthi anti-ship missile inventory replenishment rate
Iranian dhow transfers in Red Sea
properties.doctrine: Maritime Guerrilla — $2,000 drone forces $50M ship to reroute; asymmetric cost imposition
properties.wounding_strategy: Houthi demonstrated that $2k drone can force $10B/day maritime rerouting. US/UK strikes failed to degrade capacity — Iran replenishes supply chain faster than it's destroyed. This is permanent strategic shift in Red Sea power.

properties.name: Saudi Aramco — Drone/Missile Infrastructure Paralysis
properties.trigger: Saudi-Israel normalization agreement OR Saudi military action against Iran
properties.impact: Ras Tanura / Abqaiq processing destruction; 10% of world's oil offline for months
properties.cascade: Global oil $180+; Saudi economy shock; US emergency SPR release
properties.doctrine: Strategic Infrastructure Decapitation — remove enemy's economic engine
properties.wounding_strategy: 2019 Abqaiq attack (Houthi claim, US/Saudi blame Iran) took out 5% global supply in one strike. Aramco processes 10% of world's oil at facilities impossible to fully harden against saturation drone attack.

properties.name: Lebanon — Hezbollah-Israel Round 2 + State Collapse
properties.trigger: Hezbollah precision missile rebuild completion OR Israeli provocation in South Lebanon
properties.impact: Israeli air campaign on Beirut + Hezbollah 100,000+ rocket barrage on northern Israel
properties.cascade: Lebanon complete state implosion; 2M+ refugees; potential Israeli ground invasion
properties.doctrine: Deterrence Restoration — Israel must re-establish northern deterrence degraded by Oct 7
properties.wounding_strategy: Nasrallah eliminated but Hezbollah is an institution, not a person. New leadership more radical, less restrained. Lebanese state has zero capacity to prevent Hezbollah rearmament. Iran will rebuild arsenal — question is when Israel strikes the rebuild.

properties.name: Turkey-Greece Aegean Flashpoint — Maritime Collision
properties.trigger: Turkish casus belli activation (disputed island, EEZ drilling, airspace violation)
properties.impact: Limited naval/air clash between two NATO members
properties.cascade: NATO split; Article 5 vs Article 5 paradox; Erdogan domestic political boost
warning_indicators: Turkish seismic research vessel movements into Greek EEZ
Greek military exercise near disputed islands
properties.doctrine: Controlled Crisis Leverage — use managed Aegean confrontation for domestic mobilization and NATO leverage
properties.wounding_strategy: Greece and Turkey maintain 7 overlapping casus belli. Erdogan has used Aegean tensions for domestic nationalism repeatedly. Limited clash would be world's first Article 5 ally-on-ally kinetic incident.

properties.name: Sudan RSF vs SAF — Darfur Genocide + Regional Implosion
properties.trigger: ACTIVE — ongoing since April 2023
properties.impact: World's largest displacement crisis (10M+); Darfur ethnic cleansing Wave 2
properties.cascade: Chad destabilization; Egypt-Ethiopia tension over Sudan influence; Red Sea access competition
warning_indicators: UN Security Council humanitarian access votes
properties.doctrine: Warlord Attrition — RSF dismembers Sudanese state to control gold/minerals without governing
properties.wounding_strategy: RSF controls Darfur gold mines financing the war. UAE backs RSF for gold access. SAF backed by Egypt/Ethiopia/Iran for Nile/Red Sea leverage. Sudan is proxy battlefield for 6 external powers — no peace incentive exists.

properties.name: Sahel Jihadist Corridor — IS/AQ Wave 3 State Collapse Belt
properties.trigger: ACTIVE — ongoing territorial expansion
properties.impact: 5-state belt (Mali-Burkina-Niger-Chad-Nigeria) moving toward simultaneous governance failure
properties.cascade: Mass migration to Europe; mineral access disruption; IS Caliphate 2.0 territory
properties.doctrine: Population Centric Insurgency — JNIM provides governance where states fail, buying loyalty not forcing it
properties.wounding_strategy: JNIM strategy: provide courts, dispute resolution, basic security — become substitute state. Juntas expelled all Western counterterrorism partners. Result: IS/AQ expanding faster than 2014 Syria-Iraq without any containment mechanism.

properties.name: DRC Congo — Cobalt War + M23 Goma Occupation
properties.trigger: ACTIVE — M23 seized Goma January 2025
properties.impact: World's cobalt capital under rebel/Rwanda control; EV battery supply chain disruption
properties.cascade: EV/tech manufacturing cost spike; SADC-Rwanda confrontation; eastern DRC permanent partition
properties.doctrine: Resource Capture Without Annexation — Rwanda extracts mineral wealth without formal occupation costs
properties.wounding_strategy: 70% of world cobalt extracted in DRC. Rwanda's M23 controls extraction points. This is 21st century resource war dressed as rebel movement — economic warfare against global EV transition supply chain.

properties.name: Nigeria — Simultaneous 5-Front Fragmentation
properties.trigger: Naira collapse + fuel subsidy removal economic shock crossing popular tolerance
properties.impact: Simultaneous ISWAP advance + Biafra agitation + Delta disruption = federal overstretch
properties.cascade: Africa's most populous country (220M) fragmentation; regional migration crisis; oil supply disruption
properties.doctrine: 5-Front Overstretch — no federal army can simultaneously fight ISWAP, bandits, separatists, Delta, Fulani herder conflicts
properties.wounding_strategy: Africa's largest economy running 5 concurrent insurgencies with a broken naira, collapsed subsidy system, and $100B debt. Tinubu government has no political solution for any conflict — managing collapse rather than preventing it.

properties.name: Ethiopia — Tigray 2.0 + Amhara Fano + GERD Water War Triangle
properties.trigger: Tigray ceasefire collapse OR GERD second filling triggering Egypt response
properties.impact: Three-front war: Tigray re-ignition + Amhara Fano vs Addis + Egypt-Ethiopia Nile confrontation
properties.cascade: Horn of Africa destabilization; 110M population humanitarian crisis; Djibouti port access disruption
warning_indicators: Amhara Fano advance toward Addis Ababa corridor
Egyptian military exercise on Sudan border
properties.doctrine: Multi-front Overstretch — simultaneous crises exceed any military's crisis management capacity
properties.wounding_strategy: Abiy Ahmed's peace Nobel Prize disguised deepening multi-ethnic fragmentation. Fano militia now fighting toward Addis. Egypt views GERD as existential — Sisi has publicly stated war option. Ethiopia is the Horn's most dangerous flashpoint.

properties.name: Mozambique Cabo Delgado — ISIS-M LNG Resource War
properties.trigger: SADC-SAMIM mission drawdown + Total LNG restart attempt
properties.impact: IS-M expands control from Mocímboa to Pemba; LNG project permanently blocked
properties.cascade: East Africa's first IS proto-state; Tanzania border crossing; $20B gas investment destroyed
warning_indicators: IS-M attack frequency in Cabo Delgado
IS Central Africa Province communiqué frequency
properties.doctrine: Resource Denial Insurgency — prevent state from monetizing resources to fund counterinsurgency
properties.wounding_strategy: IS-M strategy is economically rational: destroy the LNG revenue that would fund their defeat. SADC intervention insufficient. Rwanda withdrew troops 2024. Total suspended $20B project. IS-M wins by denying economic development.

properties.name: Taiwan Strait — PLA Invasion Contingency 2027
properties.trigger: Xi political timeline + US strategic ambiguity test + TSMC control imperative
properties.impact: Largest amphibious operation since D-Day; TSMC destruction/capture; global semiconductor halt
properties.cascade: Global GDP -5%; US-China nuclear brinkmanship; Japan/Korea forced into war; semiconductor famine
properties.doctrine: Island Chain Strategy Inversion — seize Taiwan to break US first island chain containment
properties.wounding_strategy: Taiwan produces 90% of advanced semiconductors. PLA has conducted invasion rehearsals every quarter since 2022. Xi's political legacy requires reunification — 2027 PLA centenary is assessed deadline. Global economic shutdown is the collateral weapon.

properties.name: South China Sea — Philippines Second Thomas Shoal Confrontation
properties.trigger: PRC CGAS boarding or sinking of Philippine resupply vessel to Sierra Madre
properties.impact: Philippines invokes MDT; US forced into combat role vs PRC or abandons ally
properties.cascade: US credibility collapse in Pacific OR US-China direct military clash
warning_indicators: CGAS water cannon + collision incidents frequency
Philippine public opinion on MDT invocation
properties.doctrine: Salami-Slicing Coercion — force Philippines to choose between humiliation and escalation
properties.wounding_strategy: BRP Sierra Madre is deliberately run aground as Philippine sovereignty marker. PRC CGAS conducts weekly confrontations. If Philippines invokes MDT and US responds, it's first direct US-China combat. If US doesn't respond, Pacific alliance architecture collapses.

properties.name: India-China LAC — Himalayan Kinetic Escalation
properties.trigger: Chinese infrastructure incursion in Arunachal or Aksai Chin trigger point
properties.impact: Limited high-altitude conventional war; Indian Navy blockade of Malacca/Hormuz for Chinese shipping
properties.cascade: Nuclear shadow dynamics; Russia neutral; US cautious; global commodity disruption
warning_indicators: PLA border road/village construction rate in disputed zones
Indian strike corps deployment to Ladakh
properties.doctrine: Punitive Raid to Reset — PLA conducts limited territorial grab forcing India to negotiate from weakness
properties.wounding_strategy: PLA has infrastructure advantage (roads, airfields) on China side. Galwan 2020 killed 20 Indians. China building villages inside disputed territory permanently. India's two-front problem (China+Pakistan) is its terminal strategic dilemma.

properties.name: India-Pakistan Nuclear — Kashmir Trigger Scenario
properties.trigger: Mumbai-scale terrorist attack traced to Pakistan + Indian conventional retaliation crossing nuclear threshold
properties.impact: Pakistan tactical nuclear use under Cold Start doctrine pressure
properties.cascade: 100M+ casualties minimum; nuclear winter; global food system collapse
properties.doctrine: Full Spectrum Deterrence — Pakistan tactical nukes prevent Indian conventional war-winning
properties.wounding_strategy: Pakistan's 160+ nuclear weapons include battlefield tactical warheads explicitly designed to prevent Indian conventional retaliation after a terrorist attack. This creates world's most dangerous nuclear hair trigger — proxy attack + conventional response + tactical nuclear use ladder.

properties.name: North Korea — ICBM Atmospheric Test + EMP Threat
properties.trigger: Kim 'nuclear weapon state' legitimization demand + US election policy shift
properties.impact: Full ICBM atmospheric test over Pacific; possible EMP capability demonstration
properties.cascade: Japan Article 9 emergency revision; ROK nuclear weapons demand; US-DPRK brinkmanship
properties.doctrine: Nuclear Coercion — expand arsenal to maximize leverage; use Russia partnership to escape sanctions regime
properties.wounding_strategy: Kim supplied Russia 1M+ artillery shells — receiving missile reentry technology and satellite capability in return. Solid-fuel Hwasong-18 ICBM can launch with 30-minute warning vs 2-hour liquid-fuel. Japan/ROC are the real targets — not US.

properties.name: Pakistan Nuclear Arsenal — Collapse Risk Under Economic Failure
properties.trigger: IMF default + political collapse threatening Army budget for nuclear security
properties.impact: Pakistan's 160 nuclear weapons under uncertain command authority
properties.cascade: Worst-case: loose nukes + TTP territorial gains toward storage sites
properties.doctrine: N/A — this is systemic collapse risk, not doctrinal choice
properties.wounding_strategy: Pakistan is 7th IMF bailout. TTP attacks up 50% 2024. Army is the state — if economy collapses, army budget collapses, nuclear security budget collapses. 160 nuclear weapons in a failing state adjacent to Afghanistan is the world's #1 catastrophic risk.

properties.name: Myanmar — Three Brotherhood Alliance + Total State Collapse
properties.trigger: Brotherhood Alliance capture of last junta-held major cities
properties.impact: Complete state fragmentation: 4-5 de facto states; Tatmadaw remnant collapse
properties.cascade: 2M+ refugee wave to Thailand/India/China; narco-state zones; IS/AQ infiltration
properties.doctrine: Overwhelming Alliance Coordination — three simultaneous offensives exhaust Tatmadaw crisis response
properties.wounding_strategy: Junta controls <40% of territory. Three Brotherhood Alliance, PDFs, and NUG collectively outgun Tatmadaw. Only question is timeline. China prefers controlled partition over chaos — but may lose control of outcome.

properties.name: Malacca Strait — Taiwan War Chokepoint Activation
properties.trigger: Taiwan conflict activation triggers US blockade of Chinese energy imports
properties.impact: China pre-emptively mines Malacca; 40% of world trade halted
properties.cascade: Global supply chain collapse; Japan/Korea energy starvation; India forced into war
warning_indicators: Chinese strategic oil reserve stockpiling spike
properties.doctrine: Mutual Assured Economic Destruction — if blockaded, block the blockers
properties.wounding_strategy: 80% of China's oil imports pass through Malacca. If US blockades China (Taiwan war), China mines Malacca to impose equal economic pain globally — mutual energy starvation as deterrence. Singapore is the chokepoint's strategic hinge.

properties.name: Thailand Kra Canal — Malacca Bypass Geopolitical Battle
properties.trigger: Chinese investment approval + Thai military government decision
properties.impact: New 100km canal bypasses Malacca; Singapore loses $40B/year entrepôt revenue
properties.cascade: Singapore economic shock; US loses Malacca chokepoint leverage; China gains alternative Indo-Pacific route
warning_indicators: Chinese state enterprise Thai infrastructure investment
properties.doctrine: Infrastructure Sovereignty — control the chokepoint, control the region
properties.wounding_strategy: Kra Canal would give China an unblockable Indian Ocean route. Singapore has quietly but forcefully blocked every proposal. Thai military governments periodically revive it for Chinese infrastructure investment. The strategic stakes — US losing Pacific chokepoint leverage — make this a proxy great-power conflict.

properties.name: Bangladesh — Post-Hasina Political Collapse + Islamist Surge
properties.trigger: Military-backed government fails to hold elections + Jamaat fills vacuum
properties.impact: South Asia's 3rd largest country becomes Islamist-influenced state adjacent to India
properties.cascade: Indian border security crisis; Muslim-Hindu communal violence; China fills Bangladesh strategic vacuum
properties.doctrine: Political Vacuum Capture — Islamist movements capture states during post-authoritarian transitions
properties.wounding_strategy: Hasina's 2024 fall created South Asia's most dangerous power vacuum. Jamaat-e-Islami — designated terrorist organization by Bangladesh's own courts — is organizing freely. 170M Muslim population on India's eastern border is Pakistan's strategic opportunity.

properties.name: Mexico — Cartel FTO Designation + US Military Intervention Risk
properties.trigger: US FTO designation of Sinaloa/CJNG + fentanyl death rate political threshold
properties.impact: US unilateral special operations in Mexico; Mexican government partial state collapse response
properties.cascade: US-Mexico relationship collapse; border security military zone; cartel retaliatory attacks on US
warning_indicators: US special operations rotations to NORTHCOM Mexico posture
properties.doctrine: Ungoverned Space Exploitation — cartels profit most when states fight each other
properties.wounding_strategy: Sinaloa and CJNG generate $65B+ annually — dwarfing Mexico's security budget. Sheinbaum's accommodation strategy vs Trump's FTO designation creates collision course. US special operations in Mexico without consent is near-certainty under current political trajectory.

properties.name: Venezuela-Guyana — Essequibo Oil Territory War
properties.trigger: Maduro domestic crisis requiring nationalist distraction + Exxon/Hess oil production increase
properties.impact: Venezuelan military occupation of Essequibo (70% of Guyana's territory)
properties.cascade: US-Venezuela military standoff; ExxonMobil $30B investment threatened; Brazil-Venezuela confrontation
warning_indicators: Venezuelan military buildup on Essequibo border
properties.doctrine: Rally Around the Flag — territorial irredentism masks domestic economic catastrophe
properties.wounding_strategy: Essequibo holds $100B+ in offshore oil. Maduro stole 2024 election and faces legitimacy collapse. Territorial annexation is his maximum domestic distraction — and Guyana has no military to stop Venezuela. The constraint is US-ExxonMobil protection.

properties.name: US Power Grid — Volt Typhoon Pre-Positioned Attack
properties.trigger: Taiwan conflict activation OR China escalation decision point
properties.impact: Cascading grid failure across US Northeast/Texas; weeks-long blackout; 100+ deaths
properties.cascade: Economic paralysis; military base power loss; civilian panic; second-order infrastructure collapse
warning_indicators: Chinese APT dwell time in OT systems
properties.doctrine: Counter-Intervention Denial — pre-positioned infrastructure attack deters/delays US military Taiwan response
properties.wounding_strategy: FBI confirmed Volt Typhoon pre-positioned in US critical infrastructure for years — not for espionage but for attack capability. This is not deterrence; it is a loaded gun held at civilian infrastructure to deter Taiwan intervention. Activation would be unprecedented in US history.

properties.name: US Democratic Infrastructure — Election System Attack 2026-28
properties.trigger: High-stakes US election with narrow margins
properties.impact: Tabulation system interference + social media disinformation + result contestation
properties.cascade: Constitutional crisis; domestic political violence; NATO cohesion questions
warning_indicators: GRU reconnaissance of state election infrastructure
properties.doctrine: Democracy Disruption — delegitimize US electoral system to paralyze foreign policy
properties.wounding_strategy: Russia's 2016 operation showed asymmetric ROI: $10M social media operation created $1T+ in political damage. 2024 operation more sophisticated. Next target: actual tabulation infrastructure, not just influence. Goal is not a preferred winner — it is permanent distrust of US democratic outcomes.

properties.name: Dollar / SWIFT Bypass — BRICS Payment System Acceleration
properties.trigger: US secondary sanctions overreach + Saudi oil-yuan deal + BRICS currency announcement
properties.impact: 20-30% of global trade exits dollar system; US sanctions lose enforcement teeth
properties.cascade: Dollar reserve status erosion; US borrowing cost spike; Fed loses global monetary control
warning_indicators: US Treasury foreign holdings decline rate
properties.doctrine: Financial Sovereignty Campaign — de-weaponize dollar hegemony as precondition for multipolarity
properties.wounding_strategy: US weaponized SWIFT against Russia 2022 — accelerated every adversary's dollar-exit plan. Saudi oil-yuan deal would trigger petrodollar collapse. BRICS mBridge (China/UAE/Thailand/HK) already processing cross-border CBDC transactions. This is the slow-motion end of Bretton Woods.

properties.name: Panama Canal — Chinese Port Control Strategic Chokepoint
properties.trigger: US military/legal action to force CK Hutchison divestiture of canal ports
properties.impact: US-China economic confrontation over canal; Panamanian sovereignty crisis
properties.cascade: Canal governance militarization; Latin America great power competition pivot
warning_indicators: US SOUTHCOM Canal Zone military posture
properties.doctrine: Infrastructure Preemption — control both ends of canal before conflict, not during
properties.wounding_strategy: CK Hutchison Holdings (HK) controls Balboa and Cristóbal ports — both ends of the Panama Canal. In a Taiwan conflict, Chinese control of these ports enables military-relevant intervention in Western Hemisphere shipping. Trump administration recognized this — now attempting forced divestiture.

properties.name: Arctic Sovereignty — Russia-NATO Northern Confrontation
properties.trigger: Northern Sea Route militarization + Svalbard sovereignty challenge
properties.impact: Russian seizure of Arctic energy zones; NATO Arctic deterrence failure
properties.cascade: Energy resource competition; nuclear submarine escalation; Greenland/Iceland strategic activation
warning_indicators: Northern Fleet nuclear submarine patrol tempo
properties.doctrine: Arctic First-Mover Advantage — claim ungoverned space before international law hardens
properties.wounding_strategy: Russia claims 1.2M sq km of Arctic seabed including North Pole. Northern Sea Route gives Russia year-round commercial control if Arctic melts. NATO's northern flank (Norway, Finland, Iceland, Denmark) is Article 5's weakest link — extreme terrain, minimal forward deployment.

properties.name: Undersea Data Cable Sabotage — Global Internet Infrastructure Attack
properties.trigger: NATO-Russia escalation OR Taiwan conflict requiring internet degradation
properties.impact: Transatlantic/transpacific cable cuts; 30-50% internet traffic degradation for target regions
properties.cascade: Financial market disruption; military communications degraded; civilian panic
warning_indicators: Russian research vessel + 'shadow fleet' movements near cable routes
Unusually frequent cable repair vessel deployments
properties.doctrine: Grey Zone Infrastructure Attack — cause civilian damage below kinetic threshold
properties.wounding_strategy: Russia cut Baltic cables (Estonia, Finland, Sweden, Lithuania) Nov-Dec 2024. Each cut blamed on ship anchor — plausible deniability maintained. 400+ undersea cables carry 95% of international internet traffic. 13 cables carry all transatlantic financial transactions. Zero cables are defended.

properties.name: Western Sahara Phosphate Chokepoint — Global Food Security Attack
properties.trigger: Polisario major offensive on Moroccan phosphate extraction infrastructure
properties.impact: 72% of global phosphate reserves disrupted; fertilizer price collapse
properties.cascade: Global food price spike; famine cascade in import-dependent nations; political instability in 40+ countries
warning_indicators: Polisario attack frequency on OCP phosphate corridors
Algeria military exercise near Moroccan border
properties.doctrine: Agricultural Neurology Attack — control phosphate = control global food production without kinetic engagement
properties.wounding_strategy: Morocco controls 72% of global phosphate reserves. No phosphate = no synthetic fertilizer = global food production drops 50%. Polisario targeting OCP infrastructure would create global famine conditions within one harvest cycle. Zero international deterrence mechanism exists.

properties.name: DRC Cobalt Transport Corridors — EV Battery Supply Severance
properties.trigger: ACTIVE — ongoing M23 territory expansion
properties.impact: 70% of world cobalt at risk; EV battery production halted globally
properties.cascade: EV transition derailed; defense electronics supply chain disruption; Western battery gigafactory bankruptcy
warning_indicators: M23 advance toward Kolwezi mining hub
properties.doctrine: Resource Neurology Attack — control mineral supply chain without controlling end product
properties.wounding_strategy: 70% of global cobalt mined in DRC. M23 controls eastern DRC where mines are. China controls the processing. This is a double chokepoint — even if DRC mines it, China processes it. Western EV transition is running straight into a Chinese-controlled mineral chokepoint.

properties.name: Atacama Lithium Triangle — EV Battery Geopolitical Siege
properties.trigger: Chilean/Bolivian nationalization + Chinese investment capture of processing
properties.impact: 60% of global lithium reserves under Chinese commercial control or nationalist disruption
properties.cascade: EV battery cost spike 40-60%; Western auto industry competitive collapse; green energy transition stalled
properties.doctrine: Supply Chain Capture — control the input material for the technology defining the next century
properties.wounding_strategy: Chile-Bolivia-Argentina Lithium Triangle holds 60%+ of global reserves. China controls processing technology and is acquiring concessions across all three countries. EV revolution requires lithium — China's strategy is to control the battery mineral supply chain before the West builds the demand for it.

properties.name: Iran-Russia-China Axis — Alternative World Order Infrastructure
properties.trigger: Western sanctions pressure + US election policy discontinuity
properties.impact: Parallel trade/finance/military architecture excluding West
properties.cascade: Sanctions regime collapse; multipolar military deterrence failure; BRICS+ as counter-NATO
warning_indicators: North Korean ICBM technology transfer to Iran
properties.doctrine: Axis of Sanctioned States — mutual deterrence through collective sanctions resistance
properties.wounding_strategy: Iran supplies Russia drones; Russia gives Iran nuclear/missile tech; China buys Russian oil at discount; North Korea trades weapons for satellite tech. This is not alliance — it is a closed-loop sanctions evasion system that is also building a parallel military technology transfer network outside Western ITAR control.

properties.name: Global Space / Satellite Warfare — Blind the Enemy First
properties.trigger: Taiwan conflict activation OR major US-China military standoff
properties.impact: GPS degradation; ISR satellite blinding; Starlink interdiction; military command disruption
properties.cascade: PGM accuracy loss; drone warfare degraded; financial GPS-timing systems disrupted
warning_indicators: GPS spoofing incidents in Taiwan Strait
properties.doctrine: Space Domain Denial — blind the adversary before kinetic operations to collapse precision strike advantage
properties.wounding_strategy: US military is more GPS-dependent than any other force in history. China and Russia have tested ASAT weapons, GPS jamming, and laser dazzling of satellites. First move in any major conflict will be space domain — not to destroy satellites but to create ambiguity about reliability, which is sufficient to degrade US precision strike advantage.

properties.name: France-Africa Withdrawal — Sahel Power Vacuum Institutionalization
properties.trigger: ACTIVE — French expulsion from Mali/Burkina/Niger complete
properties.impact: Russia replaces France as Sahel security patron; IS/AQ expansion uncontested
properties.cascade: European migration surge; uranium/gold mineral capture by Russia; jihadist corridor to Mediterranean
warning_indicators: West African gold flows to Russian refineries
properties.doctrine: Counter-Colonial Positioning — expel France, capture resource revenue, allow jihadist expansion to generate migration weapon against Europe
properties.wounding_strategy: Russia's Sahel strategy is elegant: expel France (using anti-colonial sentiment), install Wagner (security for gold/uranium), allow JNIM to expand (generates refugee flows to Europe = political weapon). France lost 5,000 troops over 10 years and accomplished nothing. Russia accomplished more in 18 months.
